name: irfanabduhu
description: Distill books, web writings, video, audio, documentation, and discussions into elegant presentations and reading guides

plugins.name: readweave
plugins.description: Distill books, web writings, video, audio, documentation, and discussions into elegant presentations and reading guides. Includes /read (single book), /master (CS/technical book), /study (multi-book), /narrate (parchment narration), /paper (academic paper), /survey (multi-paper), /digest (web article), /crawl (blog index), /research (topic from scratch), /watch (YouTube video), /playlist (YouTube playlist), /listen (podcast/audio episode), /podcast (podcast series), /docs (documentation site), and /thread (discussion thread) commands.
